mapper.sql: id, title, category, explanation_zh, rule_summary, common_mistakes, difficulty, skill_tags, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT pp.*, sr.status AS study_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_content_links cl WHERE cl.target_type = 'PRONUNCIATION' AND cl.target_id = pp.id) AS link_count FROM ielts_pronunciation_points pp LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'PRONUNCIATION' AND sr.content_id = pp.id
ORDER BY pp.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_pronunciation_points pp LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'PRONUNCIATION' AND sr.content_id = pp.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_pronunciation_points (id, title, category, explanation_zh, rule_summary, common_mistakes, difficulty, skill_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{title}, #{category}, #{explanationZh}, #{ruleSummary}, #{commonMistakes}, #{difficulty}, #{skillTags}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ielts_pronunciation_points SET title = #{title}, category = #{category}, explanation_zh = #{explanationZh}, rule_summary = #{ruleSummary}, common_mistakes = #{commonMistakes}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, skill_tags = #{skillTags}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ielts_pronunciation_points (id, title, category, explanation_zh, rule_summary, common_mistakes, difficulty, skill_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{p.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{p.title}, #{p.category}, #{p.explanationZh}, #{p.ruleSummary}, #{p.commonMistakes}, #{p.difficulty}, #{p.skillTags}, #{p.createdAt}, #{p.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT pp.* FROM ielts_pronunciation_points pp WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ielts_study_records sr WHERE sr.content_type = 'PRONUNCIATION' AND sr.content_id = pp.id ) ORDER BY pp.difficulty, pp.id LIMIT #{limit}
